data.body: PASS 1 (E4) note: the plan's central premise — "there is no single developer-facing API REFERENCE describing the reuse surface" — appears contradicted by the codebase. `docs/reuse-surface.md` already exists and substantively documents all four subsystems (signing, LLM runtime, prompt/contract, output-schema seam) with verified signatures and a worked plan-review consumer. The plan should be reconciled to ADD-TO / verify-drift on that existing doc rather than create it fresh. All other codebase assertions verified accurate against source (signing API/verdicts/SIGNATURE event, Runner/RunRequest fields, prompts get_prompt/resolve_prompt/.rebar overrides/CI drift gate, run_workflow/RunResult, validate_structured).
